name: consolidated safeguards script exit code is non-zero when at least one safeguard fires and zero when all checks pass clean
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"author":"a","reviewer":"b","author_org":"x","reviewer_org":"y","opened_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z","merged_at":"2026-05-13T10:00:00Z"},{"number":2,"author":"c","reviewer":"d","author_org":"x","reviewer_org":"z","opened_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z","merged_at":"2026-05-13T10:00:00Z"},{"number":3,"author":"e","reviewer":"f","author_org":"y","reviewer_org":"x","opened_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z","merged_at":"2026-05-13T10:00:00Z"}]}\n' > clean.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern clean.json --all-checks 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" = "0" ] && grep -q 'flags_fired=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
